use.flag:
Use the HIBP third-party service to check if the password has already been compromised. The password is first hashed to SHA-1, truncated to 5 chars, then compared using k-anonymity.
This feature accessed from the Menu - Safe Settings - Audit - Check passwords for online breaches - Refresh button. It will show either a compromised accounts list or no records found message if not found in a data breach.
Use a conservative symbol set to limit rejection or to avoid issues on websites.
